title: Domain Pack Tool Definition (*.tool.json)
description: DECLARATIVE tool spec for a domain pack. Contract-first phase: describes a tool the future Hermes runtime will execute — there is NO executor here. The 'effect' must be consistent with the pack's execution_mode (a write-effect tool is a policy violation in a read-only pack).

effect.description: read = observes; write = mutates a live system (requires hitl/staging tier)

api.description: the official API this tool will call at runtime, e.g. GA4 Data API

requires_approval.description: runtime hint: pause for human approval before executing (HITL packs)

inputSchema.description: JSON Schema for the tool's inputs
